caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring an interview or discussion titled "No More Time: Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty." The split-screen format shows two individuals engaged in conversation. On the left, a woman with red hair and a blue patterned top is speaking, while on the right, an older man with white hair, glasses, and a beard listens attentively. The background of the woman's side includes decorative string lights, suggesting a cozy indoor setting, while the man's background features a blue wall with framed pictures and a sign that reads "OPEN." The overall tone seems serious and focused on the topic of climate crisis poetry.
